title: Custom Popup when status change
excerpt: Is there any way to display custom content in a popup window when status changes to ‘Done’ for example? not notification in the notification center .

posts.author: Zahavit (Zahavit Simhayev)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to display custom content in a popup window when status changes to ‘Done’ for example? not notification in the notification center .

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, such functionality is currently not available but it sure will be a great add to the platform
